title: Street Blocks
description: This mod adds street blocks that can have a white or yellow line.
body: This mod adds street blocks. Craft 9 street blocks with 6 gray concrete and 3 black concrete. Right-click a street block with white or yellow dye to get a white or yellow line on it. Remove the line by right-clicking it with a water bottle. I'm sorry, but the street blocks can only be placed in the north-south orientation.
